overview.minides: India's #1 selling mid-size SUV for 10 straight years — now with dual 10.25-inch screens, Level 2 ADAS, and a 160 hp turbo-petrol DCT.
overview.description: The 2024-facelifted Hyundai Creta carries forward its decade-long segment leadership with a bolder, more squared-off design, split LED lighting, dual 10.25-inch screens (infotainment + digital cluster), and a far wider safety net including Level 2 ADAS on top trims. It is offered across 7 core trims — E, EX, EX(O), S(O), SX, SX Premium, and King — with three engines: a 1.5L NA petrol (115 PS), a 1.5L CRDi diesel (116 PS), and a 1.5L turbo-petrol (160 PS) paired to a 7-speed DCT. Transmission choices span 6-speed manual, IVT (petrol), 6-speed torque-converter automatic (diesel), and 7-speed DCT (turbo). Special editions include the Knight Edition (black exterior, matte alloys) and King Edition (flagship trim with Level 2 ADAS, 18-inch alloys, powered driver seat with memory).

colors.name: Atlas White with Titanium Black Roof

suspension.additionalTech: Multi-link rear suspension on Turbo variants

variants.name: Creta EX
keyFeatures: 8-inch Touchscreen with Wireless Android Auto & CarPlay

variants.name: Creta S(O)
keyFeatures: Electronic Parking Brake with Auto Hold

variants.name: Creta King
